findings.evidence: In the PDF, the names and titles (e.g., 'PAT MCCRORY Governor') are positioned in a right-aligned block at the top of the page. In the HTML, they are left-aligned below the logo.

findings.description: Extraneous digital signature metadata rendered as visible text
findings.evidence: The HTML includes a text block starting with 'Digitally signed by Elizabeth S Werner...' inserted between the 'From' and 'Subject' lines. This is hidden signature metadata in the PDF and not part of the visible source text.
The lead-in terms for the bulleted list (e.g., 'Excavation', 'Groundwater Assessments') are both bold and underlined in the PDF. In the HTML, they are bold but missing the underline formatting.
The lead-in terms for the bulleted list (e.g., 'Beneficial Reuse', 'Health Concerns') are both bold and underlined in the PDF. In the HTML, they are bold but missing the underline formatting.
The lead-in terms for the bulleted list (e.g., 'Risk Classification', 'Surface Water') are both bold and underlined in the PDF. In the HTML, they are bold but missing the underline formatting.
